title: ENCOUNTER
overview: Arrival of the military students and passengers on Aries Station. Commencement of their training.

title: CONTACT
overview: Shuhei, Aki and Aya arrive. Ryota buys time for Sayaka during a training simulation for her to find Aya and tell that she will not be able to see each other.

title: OUTBREAK
overview: Warning klaxons signal an emergency. Terrorists begin their attack while the crew and passengers attempt to evacuate.

title: BREATHING SPACE
overview: Some are stranded on the station. Shuhei and Cellaria are injured in battle. Flashback to Nao's childhood.

title: WATERSHED
overview: Flashback to Aki's childhood. The military students prepare for a counter-assault on the terrorists.

title: FAREWELL
overview: Cellaria is captured. Shuhei attempts a rescue.

title: FLUX
overview: Discovery of a strange virus. Cooperation occurs all over the station for survival. Nao is injured in an attack.

title: DESIRE
overview: Nanami is found. The terrorists are double-crossed. Flashback to Yu's childhood.

title: ROUSE
overview: Shuhei is being corrupted. Yu is captured but escapes with the help of her childhood friend.

title: STRAY
overview: Cellaris's past is revealed. The military students make plans to leave the station.

title: MOURNING
overview: Aya manages to escape at the cost of Gale's life who ensures her safety.

title: JOURNEY
overview: With the station starting to burn up in the atmosphere of Earth, the rest of the crew commenced the evacuation of the station. The event shifted forward for 1 year, where everyone returned to their normal lives. Most characters' futures were revealed as well.
